entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by a deficiency of precipitation over an extended period, affecting agricultural practices

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: The salt content in the soil, which acts as a challenge to agricultural practices

entities.name: FLOODING
entities.description: An overflow of water that submerges land, acting as a challenge to agricultural practices

entities.name: RAINFALL
entities.description: Natural precipitation serving as a water source for crop growth

entities.name: IRRIGATION
entities.description: Artificial application of water to land to assist in the production of crops

entities.name: CROP ESTABLISHMENT METHODS
entities.description: Techniques used to plant and establish crops in the field

entities.name: CROPPING INTENSITY
entities.description: A measure of the number of crops planted annually in an area, used as an indicator of food security

entities.name: FOOD SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to a sufficient quantity of affordable, nutritious food

entities.name: MODIS NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index derived from MODIS satellite data used to investigate crop intensity

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent and study region where smallholder farms make current cropping intensity quantification inaccurate

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region and study area where smallholder farms make current cropping intensity quantification inaccurate

entities.name: LANDSAT 8
entities.description: A satellite providing 30-m resolution data used in combination with Sentinel-2 for crop intensity mapping

entities.name: SENTINEL-2
entities.description: A satellite providing 10 to 20-m resolution data used in combination with Landsat 8 for crop intensity mapping

entities.name: AUTOMATED CROP INTENSITY ALGORITHM
entities.description: An algorithm (ACIA) developed to produce 30-m crop intensity maps using multi-source time-series data

entities.name: GOOGLE EARTH ENGINE
entities.description: A cloud computing platform used for the implementation and scaling of the ACIA algorithm

entities.name: NDVI TIME-SERIES
entities.description: Temporal sequences of Normalized Difference Vegetation Index data used to identify crop intensity classes

entities.name: SINGLE CROP
entities.description: A crop intensity classification where only one crop is grown in a specific season

entities.name: DOUBLE CROP
entities.description: A crop intensity classification where two crops are grown annually in the same area

entities.name: CONTINUOUS CROP
entities.description: A crop intensity classification where crops are grown continuously throughout the year

entities.name: SAGE CROP CALENDAR DATASET
entities.description: A global crop seasonality map used as a reference for cropping intensity mapping

entities.name: SURVEY-BASED STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical data derived from surveys used to evaluate the accuracy of the ACIA crop intensity map

relationships.description: affects agricultural practices and thus intensity
